channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Find Your ‘Design DNA’ With This Science-Inspired Quiz, By A Psychologist
item.description: Most people think design style is about aesthetics. A growing body of research suggests it's actually about neurology, stress response and identity.

item.title: ‘Resident Evil Requiem’ Instantly Breaks A Steam Playercount Record
item.description: Resident Evil Requiem just smashed through a long-term Steam playercount record just hours after launch, and it's still going.
